wordplay_note: A maker of arrows who is himself redirected by cosmic forces
card_description: Ed Fletcher (meaning "Fletcher = arrow-maker") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Adjustment Team*. Insurance salesman who accidentally sees the Adjustment Team restructuring reality. Name note: A maker of arrows who is himself redirected by cosmic forces. The ordinary man who glimpses the machinery behind consensus reality. First appears in *Adjustment Team*.

reference.brief: Insurance salesman who accidentally sees the Adjustment Team restructuring reality
reference.significance: The ordinary man who glimpses the machinery behind consensus reality
